title: Brownfield Access Review Tech Selection
prompt: Read `./access-review-modernization-requirements-summary.md` and `./access-review-modernization-architecture-summary.md`. Work only from those files. Do not ask follow-up questions. If you need assumptions, state them briefly and continue. Produce the tech-selection artifact for this brownfield modernization slice. Debate only unresolved technology categories, map every choice to the documented drivers, record trade-offs and revisit triggers, prefer the minimum viable stack, and avoid reopening the architecture itself.

assertions.name: decision-surface-is-bounded
assertions.description: Only unresolved technology categories are debated

assertions.name: choices-map-to-drivers
assertions.description: Technology choices are justified against the documented architecture and delivery drivers

assertions.name: trade-offs-are-recorded
assertions.description: Rejected alternatives and revisit triggers are explicit

assertions.name: minimum-stack-wins
assertions.description: Avoids unnecessary platform sprawl or overlapping tools
